description_long: This kiosk is a compact, freestanding structure with a cubic upper section mounted on a slender vertical pole and supported by a cross-shaped base. The upper box features a front-facing display area with signage and what appears to be a small service window or interface, likely for ticketing or information purposes. The sides and rear of the box are mostly plain, with some subtle color accents and minimal surface detailing. The pole and base are metallic, providing stability and a modern, utilitarian appearance. The kiosk's design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on function over ornamentation. Its small footprint and height make it suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near transit stops.
description: A minimalist, pole-mounted kiosk with a cubic display box, front signage, and a cross-shaped metal base. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the display area with signage and a possible service window or interface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain surface with minimal detailing and no visible signage or windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays subtle color accents and a clean, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: Rear view is plain, with no signage, windows, or interactive features visible.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the front display panel, with visible text and symbols
attribute_window_presence: one small rectangular window/interface on the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, part of the cubic upper section, made of metal or plastic with no overhangs or decorative features
